# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The maintainer supports:

- The most recent release with bug fixes and security patches.
- Critical security fixes may be backported to the previous minor release if upgrading is non-trivial.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

To report a security vulnerability, please open a [Security Vulnerability Report](https://github.com/benbenbang/raycast-clip/issues/new?template=security.yml) issue.

If the vulnerability is sensitive, contact the maintainer directly rather than using the public issue tracker.
